title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 441.190 - Rent due on lease for life, how recovered
text:
441.190.  Rent due on lease for life, how recovered. — Any person having any rent due upon any lease for life may have the same remedy, by action for the recovery thereof, as if such lease were for years.
(RSMo 1939 § 2961) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2575; 1919 § 6871; 1909 § 7874
